name: bulksms.com
prose:
# BulkSMS JSON REST API API

## Overview The JSON REST API allows you to submit and receive [BulkSMS](https://www.bulksms.com/) messages. You can also get access to past messages and see your account profile. The base URL to use for this service is `https://api.bulksms.com/v1`. The base URL cannot be used on its own; you must append a path that identifies an operation and you may have to specify some path parameters as well. 

## Getting started

The BulkSMS JSON REST API API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://api.bulksms.com/v1`.

## Authentication

This API uses HTTP Basic authentication — supply your username and password with each request.

## API reference

### GET /blocked-numbers
List blocked numbers
Returns a single record.

### POST /blocked-numbers
Create a blocked number

### POST /credit/transfer
Transfer credits to another account

### GET /messages
Retrieve Messages
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `limit`, `filter`, `sortOrder`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### POST /messages
Send Messages

### GET /messages/send
Send message by simple GET or POST
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `to`, `body`, `deduplication-id`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /messages/{id}
Show Message
Returns a single record.

### GET /messages/{id}/relatedReceivedMessages
List Related Messages
Returns a list of records.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /profile
Get profile
Returns a single record.

### POST /rmm/pre-sign-attachment
Upload an attachment via a signed URL

### GET /webhooks
List webhooks
Returns a list of records.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### POST /webhooks
Create a webhook

### GET /webhooks/{id}
Read a webhook
Returns a single record.

### POST /webhooks/{id}
Update a webhook

### DELETE /webhooks/{id}
Delete a webhook
